name: Transparent Tape
description: You’ve discovered the Emergency Load-Bearing Adhesive. In a workspace where the 3D printer is backed up and the custom brackets haven't arrived, this roll of transparent office tape has been promoted from 'closing envelopes' to 'primary cooling support'. It’s currently acting as a high-tech shim to prop up a fan at just the right angle to prevent a processor from self-immolating.
